target:
(Maybe she was trying to give me some hint
through this…)

This terrible vibe…
It's definitely the real thing…

Please change quickly.
Everyone else is already ready!

H-how does it look…?
It's my first time… I'm wearing a yukata…

What?
I asked Tokiko to help me dress!
I thought this would make it easier to tell the real one from the fake!

(The shadow Mio was wearing a uniform…
She must have copied Mio's uniform look somewhere)

(The real one wearing a yukata means
even if I meet the shadow,
I'll be able to tell them apart immediately!)
I haven't told Tokiko anything yet.

By the way,
what was that thing you said you wanted to check yesterday?
Did you find anything out?

It's not a big deal at all!
Forget about it!

Here!
Talk faster and let's go!
Is Ushio waiting impatiently?

Sister, she was really looking forward to today's festival…
She might be somewhere.

Let's go already!
For her sake.

Sou…
You wanted to be a doctor, right?
Why are you saying such unscientific things?!

It's fine.
It's the festival night, after all.
